generated_oml:
import base
import DTDFVocab

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for traceability through historical data logging"
]

instance OptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for optimal control of system parameters"
]

instance IndoorAirQualityVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of indoor air quality for virus spread prevention"
]

instance AirQualitySimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation insight for indoor air quality scenarios"
]

instance VirusSpreadPredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of virus spread based on air quality data"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for validating model accuracy against physical data"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for detecting system anomalies and faults"
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for providing optimal control to optimize system performance",
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for logging historical data to TimescaleDB for traceability",
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of indoor air quality",
    DTDFVocab:provides IndoorAirQualityVisualization
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for simulating indoor air quality scenarios",
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualitySimulationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for predicting virus spread based on air quality",
    DTDFVocab:provides VirusSpreadPredictionInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for continuous validation of model accuracy against physical data",
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for detecting anomalies and faults in the system",
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for time-series data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance InfluxDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "InfluxDB database for time-series data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub for version control of digital twin models",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AutomationMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "AutomationML for modeling and exchange of digital twin information",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance AzureToolsEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for digital twin pipeline implementation",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance VirtualMachineEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Virtual machines hosting prerecorded data for deployment",
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance ActiveMQEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ActiveMQ message broker for data processing and communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CraneStateSensor,
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CraneStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors on physical gantry crane measuring state data",
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneCPS
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python program interface for physical crane data collection and MQTT publishing",
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneCPS
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MQTT message broker for data transmission between physical and virtual components",
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneCPS
]

instance GantryCraneController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Controller for the physical gantry crane system",
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneCPS
]

instance GantryCraneCPS : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system as a cyber-physical system (CPS) exemplar",
    base:contains CraneStateSensor, GantryCraneController, PhysicalCraneInterface, MQTTBroker
]

instance TimescaleDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data logged to TimescaleDB for historical traceability",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance InfluxDBData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data stored in InfluxDB for model training and analysis",
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance ActualGreenhouseSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model of the actual greenhouse system for indoor air quality management"
]

instance DigitalTwinModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital twin model of the gantry crane system",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitHubEnabler, AutomationMLEnabler, InfluxDBEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [

]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture visualized using the C4 Model context and container diagrams with an ad-hoc implementation utilizing containerization and virtualization technologies for component integration and resource management."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol facilitates inter-service communication via the MQTT Broker. TimescaleDB serves as the data storage layer, and Grafana is used for visualization. ]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [

]

    base:desc "Compliance with AutomationML standard for digital twin modeling as referenced in [14]."
